Changelog Storm Brand Inquisitor League Starter for Path of Exile Mirage 3.28 by Velyna Mirage 3.28 Last Updated: May 10, 2026 Follow Changelog FAQ Get Link Advertisement This website is supported by ads.
The Strom Brand Inquisitor uses critical strikes and elemental damage to vanquish foes, while consecrating the ground he walks on to restore himself.
Your Critical Strikes ignoring enemy resistances makes it easier to deal with bosses, and the curse protection from you Consecrated ground means you can run maps which would otherwise be dangerous.
Cast speed increases both placement speed and damage frequency.
During the Campaign and Early Mapping, you wear hybrid armour / energy shield rare items to provide Physical Mitigation without requiring too much Strength .
When you acquire Ghostwrithe , you begin using Energy Blade and Spellblade Support to scale damage from life .
Continue stacking life and life recovery, swapping to Blood Magic when you can sustain the 10% life cost from Rathpith Globe .
Storm Brand Inquisitor Resistances You do not need specific resistances on any item, just get the required total resistances amongst all gear combined.

Skills Mirage 3.28 Storm Brand Inquisitor League Starter Level 1 - 12 Storm Brand Raise Spectre Energy Blade Rolling Magma is your main damage dealer until level 12, supported by Holy Flame Totem and Flame Wall .
Combustion Support support is available early to support either Rolling Magma or Holy Flame Totem .
Flame Wall is a lingering ground AoE which damages enemies and buffs projectiles you fire through it.
Holy Flame Totem is also lingering damage but in totem form, can be dropped alongside Flame Wall to burst down bosses.
The totems also create consecrated ground in a small radius around themselves, providing you life regeneration.
Added Lightning Damage Support and Arcane Surge Support can be added immediately.
Storm Brand damages not only what it attaches to but surrounding monsters as well, if the attached monster dies before the brand expires it then attaches to a new target.
Use Brand Recall to summon all existing brands to your position for a large pulse of damage.
Raise Spectre is used with a Perfect Spirit of Fortune which provides Lightning Damage is Lucky and the Wrath aura.
Companionship Support causes this spectre to absorb some of the damage from hits taken.
Energy Blade consumes half of energy shield to overwrite the equipped mainhand weapon with a spectral blade whose damage increases with energy shield consumed.
This damage is then applied to spells by way of Spellblade Support support.

Righteous Providence - You need to take Righteous Providence to path to Inevitable Judgement , in addition it provides the build with critical strike chance as you need 200 int and 300 str to use all of your gems and items.
Since Righteous Providence takes the lower of the two this results in 200% increased critical strike chance.
Inevitable Judgement - With this node allocated Inquisitors can ignore elemental resistance completely.
Things like Conductivity and Lightning Penetration Support lose value, because the monster's resistances are treated as zero by your critical strikes.
Consecrated ground grants 6% life regeneration per second and 50% reduced effect of curses on you by default.
Pious Path - Consecrated Ground now also grants 6% energy shield regeneration per second.
Replace Increased Critical Strikes Support with Lightning Penetration Support or Invert the Rules Support support when making this change.
Campaign Tree - Grab life , cast speed, spell and elemental damage, and crit.
Avoid penetration and resistance lowering effects especially after allocating Inevitable Judgement .
Towards the end of campaign begin taking block nodes on the tree.
Mid Game - Place more points in block and power charge scaling.
Cluster jewels provide substantial damage and defense in this stage.
Doryani's Lesson plus Stormrider on a Large Cluster Jewel gives leech and power charges while Enduring Composure on a Small Cluster Jewel gives endurance charges.
Before the large cluster leech can come from The Highwayman or an eldritch implicit on gloves .

Mapping Elemental Hit Slayer Gear Paradoxica remains one of the strongest weapons for the build thanks to its ability to double damage and scale extremely well with added elemental damage.

With this setup in place, Elemental Hit always selects Fire, allowing the build to fully benefit from all of your Fire damage scaling, penetration, and other Fire-specific modifiers.
This interaction is one of the largest power spikes available to the build and significantly improves both damage consistency and overall performance when transitioning into Elemental Hit.

When evaluating jewels, prioritize useful transformed passives such as "Gain 1 Rage on Melee Hit" , Fire Resistance , or "Gain an Endurance Charge on Kill" , as these provide both damage and defensive utility for the build.
With the addition of Enmity's Embrace , your Fire Resistance becomes one of your most important damage stats .

How to Roll Maps Crafting Guide Defenses How do I find a good Timeless Jewel This guide by TriPolarBear goes over how to find the perfect Timeless jewel you're looking for.
Tempered by War converts 50% of Cold and Lightning damage you take into Fire damage .
This can be extremely powerful for this build because you stack very high maximum Fire Resistance .

If your Fire Resistance cap is around 90% , while your Cold and Lightning resistances are near the normal 75% , converting incoming damage into Fire allows you to mitigate significantly more damage overall.
The downside is that Tempered by War reduces your Cold and Lightning resistances by 50% of their value .
Because of this, you should only take the node if you can still comfortably cap Cold and Lightning resistance after the penalty.
If you can maintain 75% Cold and Lightning resistance even after taking Tempered by War, the node becomes a very strong defensive option and is generally worth using.
Ideally you want it to hit Lifetap Support , since this allows Elemental Hit to be cast using life instead of mana, which helps the build function with very little unreserved mana.
If you miss Lifetap Support , other good outcomes are Increased Critical Damage Support or Increased Critical Strikes Support , both of which are strong damage options.
Why exactly does Fire Resistance buff Elemental Hit's damage?
Because of the way Enmity's Embrace works, your Fire Resistance is converted into offensive scaling .
The ring causes your Fire Resistance to apply to your damage , effectively turning what is normally a purely defensive stat into a damage multiplier.
This means that every point of Fire Resistance you gain not only improves your survivability but also increases the damage dealt by your fire-based skills.
Since the build forces Elemental Hit to always deal Fire damage through Avatar of Fire and Combat Focus jewels, all of your damage scaling becomes centered around Fire.
As a result, stacking Fire Resistance directly increases the damage output of Elemental Hit while simultaneously improving your defenses.
This interaction is what makes Fire Resistance one of the most valuable stats for the build, allowing you to scale both damage and survivability from the same source.
Showcase 3.28 Elemental Hit Slayer League Starter Summary 3.28 Elemental Hit Slayer League Starter Elemental Hit is an ability that normally cycles between Fire, Lightning, and Cold damage.
By forcing Elemental Hit to only deal Fire damage and pairing it with Enmity's Embrace , you turn Fire Resistance into one of the build’s biggest damage scalers.
Once the setup is complete, Elemental Hit always deals Fire damage and fully benefits from your Fire Resistance to Fire penetration.
Elemental Hit plays as a fast melee mapper that stacks Fire Resistance to scale both damage and defense, allowing Elemental Hit to hit extremely hard while remaining surprisingly tanky.

Holy Hammers is a lightning -based slam skill that converts 50% of your physical damage into lightning .

If you expend a Power Charge , that cascade doubles from two to four hammers, massively increasing the area coverage and damage.
Sanctuary gives you reliable Consecrated Ground while Righteous Providence provides a large amount of free critical strike chance.
Slam the ground and call down Holy Hammers from the sky, wiping out packs and crushing bosses with massive bursts of lightning-infused damage.
Holy Hammers is a lightning based slam attack that converts 50% of your physical damage into lightning damage .
With the addition of Physical to Lightning Support , you convert all of your physical damage on your weapon into lightning damage.
When paired with Melee Physical Damage Support , this becomes a lethal combo scaling your lightning damage like crazy.
Autoexertion also reserves mana total to all of the warcries combined.
Most Warcries exert your next attacks, which provides a massive damage boost for slam skills.

Assassin's Mark paired with Mark On Hit Support is guaranteed power charges which makes your Holy Hammers do 20% more damage and cascade an extra two times.

Cast when Damage Taken Support paired with Molten Shell gives you a ton of EHP.

Drop Orb of Storms for additional damage on Bosses and tougher encounters.
There are multitude of applicable buffs available to increase your damage, like Herald of Thunder and Herald of Ice .
In Act 4, pick up Summon Lightning Golem to provide some cast speed and mana regen.
After you defeat Malachai, you can add a Cast when Damage Taken Support setup with Immortal Call .
Frostblink should still be used as needed since it procs Arcane Surge Support and is really useful to jump over gaps.
Penance Brand of Dissipation makes Penance Brand work much more like Storm Brand , but with a lot more damage once properly scaled.
Tempest Shield is eventually taken to help cap out Spell Block.

On Endgame+ Setups, Stormblast Mine is taken as a way to improve single target damage and should be cast while you wait to reapply the two brands you can have per enemy and, if the situation allows it, before the encounter begins.
Clarity can be taken when you free up a gem slot with the new Coin Currency or can be taken instead of one of Stormblast Mine supports in order to make the build feel smoother to play.
Coin Corruptions Penance Brand of Dissipation best pairs with the following Coin Corruptions: Offensive: Cruelty Support , Arcane Surge Support , Culling Strike Support , Added Fire Damage Support .
Skill Gems may Brick Make sure to always have a replacement Skill Gem ready to go before you Slam your main Skill Gem as certain supports may make it unusable for your current build.
Righteous Providence facilitates getting 100% Critical Strike Chance, even quite early in your journey, by just getting attributes you already want to get.
This is a powerhouse of an Ascendancy Passive that increases your damage significantly.
Said Consecrated Ground also makes your enemies take 15% increased damage.
Lastly, while in Consecrated Ground , your Life regen also applies to Energy Shield, which is incredibly good for the early hybrid setups before you go Chaos Inoculation .
Remember to use the crafting bench to fill any free Affix slots you may have on your gear, as some extra Life and Resist rolls can go a long way.

Early Maps Once you have finished the campaign, try to grab yourself a 5/6-link Chest Piece, Penance Brand of Dissipation and a good Wand or Scepter with +1 All skills and other decent stats like Spell Damage, Spell Critical Strike Chance and Cast Speed.
It is fine to keep Penance Brand for a bit until you manage to grab enough currency to swap.
Make sure to do a lot of Chaos Recipes , as it not only helps for getting enough initial currency but it is also one of the best ways to make currency until you start getting into red maps.
Endgame Make sure to prepare all the gear you need before making the swap to Chaos Inoculation , as without decent energy shield gear you will just fall over when ever an enemy simply looks your way.

Stat Priorities Mirage 3.28e Penance Brand Inquisitor League Starter Learn more If you're struggling to survive, progress or want to learn more about damage and defenses in Path of Exile check out our Getting Started section.
Item Bases Throughout your Atlas progression, focus on wearing hybrid Armour and Energy Shield bases.

The Armour reduces some of the physical damage you are taking while the Energy Shield provides some additional Effective Health Points, taking full advantage of your Pious Path Ascendancy passive to double the amount of Effective Health Points you regen per second.
These hybrid bases are also really great since you can easily roll Blue and Red sockets, which are 90% of your skills and support gems.

Once you reach a point where you are ready to swap to a Chaos Inoculation setup, you want strictly Energy Shield bases, ideally only the top of the crop, with the exception of your Helmet, where you want a Archdemon Crown for the +2 to your Penance Brand of Dissipation .
Inpulsa's Broken Heart explosions have the requirement of the enemies being Shocked, which is not really a problem since most of your damage is Lightning .

On the Giga Setup, your explosions come from the Synthesis Implicit "Enemies you kill have a 15% chance to explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum life as physical damage" on your Weapon, either a Wand or Scepter.
This can be quite expensive, but it frees up other slots to gain a lot of more power and defenses on build.
During the campaign, try to get Life and Resistances on every non-weapon item, but make sure to prioritize gem links on items as well.
Try to get your Elemental Resistances as close to 75% as you can; remember to use the Crafting Bench in your Hideout as needed.
Try to do your first two Labs as soon as you can, as that boosts your damage tremendously.
Also try to get a decent elemental Wand or Scepter with Cast Speed, as that is the main way to increase your damage right now.
Cap your Resists and meet your Attribute requirements.
If you don't happen to have enough Energy Shield to cast it, swap Increased Duration Support for Inspiration Support for the 34% less Mana Cost it provides to any linked gem.
Penance Brand of Dissipation Inquisitor Early Mapping Gear Clusters increase your damage significantly and give you access to a bunch of jewel slots.
Prioritize % Life, Cast Speed and Critical Strike Multiplier.
You can also use these jewels to fix some Block you may be missing or more reservation efficiency if you need.
In this setup, you run a number of Uniques: The Red Nightmare , together with Tattoo of the Ngamahu Firewalker on the surrounding Strength nodes, provides a lot of Block Chance.
Penance Brand of Dissipation Inquisitor Endgame Gear Prism Guardian to be able to reserve more aura/support gems and enable Pain Attunement .

Try to grab one with a good corruption like % life, +2 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems, +2 to Level of Socketed Aura Gems, +1 Power Charges or even Socketed Skill Gems get a 90% Cost & Reservation Multiplier if you wanna try to squeeze in Vitality into the build.
The Taming provides a great generic multiplier and makes capping resists extremely easy.
The Magnate is a practically free 10% damage multi, since you already want to get strength in this build, and some nice resistances.
Rumi's Concoction helps to round out Block Chance.
On this setup, take Chaos Inoculation and fully swap to Energy Shield.
Foulborn Berek's Respite allows you to keep Inpulsa's Broken Heart's explode while freeing the chest piece and allowing you to go full energy shield with Chaos Inoculation .
Replica Dragonfang's Flight gives 3 extra ranks to Penance Brand of Dissipation and also a good amount of reservation efficiency.
If you wanna be extra defensive, you can even swap The Magnate for a Double Influenced Crystal Belt like this one Crystal Belt without losing much damage.

Penance Brand of Dissipation Inquisitor Endgame Gear Forbidden Flame and Forbidden Flesh with Unwavering Crusade are a big damage spike, as this Ascendancy passive gives you Hatred , Wrath and Anger .
Atziri's Promise and Taste of Hate are used for a bit of extra damage.

(this step can be bypassed at this stage but it is mandatory if you want to eventually upgrade to something like the helmet in the Giga Setup) Use Essence of Horror on it until you hit "Socketed Gems are Supported by Level # Hypothermia, #% increased Effect of Cold Ailments".
This is a 1/6 to hit "Socketed Spells have +3% to Critical Strike Chance".
On success, you can simply craft "Suffixes can not be changed" and use a Veiled Chaos Orb .
With the introduction of Mageblood , the build becomes way tankier, faster and gains a bit extra damage.
Remember to also invest in a new set of Flasks, as that is where Mageblood's Power comes from.
Impossible Escape , together with Elegant Hubris , allows you to cap Block with less points while potentially providing a lot of damage as well.
Your priority is getting two "12% chance to block attack damage" nodes.
Use Essence of Horror on it until you hit "Socketed Gems are Supported by Level # Hypothermia, #% increased Effect of Cold Ailments".

you can simply craft "Suffixes can not be changed" and use a Reforge and Influenced Rare item on the Horticrafting Station until you hit "Socketed Gems are Supported by Level # Concentrated Effect, #% increased Area Damage".
Craft "Suffixes can not be changed" once again and use a Veiled Exalted Orb and hope to not hit "Socketed Gems are Supported by Level # Concentrated Effect, #% increased Area Damage".
If you hit "Socketed Gems are Supported by Level # Concentrated Effect, #% increased Area Damage" go back to Step 9.

Otherwise, avoid the following modifiers: Monsters reflect 18% of Elemental Damage Players have (-12--9)% to all maximum Resistances Players cannot Regenerate Life, Mana or Energy Shield Players have (20-60)% less Recovery Rate of Life and Energy Shield Although "Monsters reflect 18% of Physical Damage" is not mentioned above, it can give you some trouble early on before if you can not convert all your physical damage to Lightning, as you might be doing small amounts of Physical Damage.
The build does incredible single target damage with Penance Brand of Dissipation and levers Explode mods for impressive clearspeed.

Flat Elemental Damage to Attacks can roll or be crafted onto the following slots: Bow - The largest source of Flat Elemental Damage Quiver - The second largest source of Flat Elemental Damage Rings Amulet Gloves The above items are listed in order of offensive mod priority.
There are other sources of Flat Damage, such as Searching Eye Jewel's , but they aren't consistently available to consider for campaign progression.

Bow Quivers Rings & Amulets Trinity Support Trinity Support provides a large damage bonus when at 50 Resonance of each Element.
When you hit an enemy with a Supported Skill, where the highest damage type is Elemental, you gain Resonance of the other 2 Elements.

Practically this means: A large Lightning Damage range Accompanied by Fire or Cold Damage that fits into that range For Example: If you have a Lightning Damage Range of 1 to 100 Then a Cold or Fire Damage Range of 40 to 60 is ideal The most common error is over-investing into a single damage type without gaining an adequate amount of other elements.

For example: Using a Bow with lots of Flat Fire Damage and no other elemental damage rolls Running Anger & Wearing Rings with Flat Fire Damage to Attacks to Crafts Most likely causes a Resonance gain issue.

Meaning your damage is scaled by the following methods: Increased Projectile Damage, Increased Attack Damage Increased Attack Speed % More Attack Damage: via Precise Technique , Point Blank Additional Projectiles for more "Overlaps" to hit an enemy multiple times: via Volley + Lesser Multiple Projectiles at Level 28 and Greater Volley + Volley at Level 38 or higher.

Consuming Utility Flask Charges Added Cold Damage if charges were consumed from a Sapphire Flask Added Lighting Damage if charges were consumed from a Topaz Flask % to Damage over Time Multiplier with Ignite if charges were consumed from a Ruby Flask Flat Damage, Essences & Crafts Flat Elemental Damage to Attacks is extremely important & crucial to acquire to continuously scale your damage throughout progression.

Note: If using Corrupting Fever + Lifetap Support is not your cup of tea, it's perfectly reasonable to complete the campaign as a Slayer instead.

Explosive Concoction can consume flask charges for additional buffs: Added Cold Damage if charges were consumed from a Sapphire Flask Added Lighting Damage if charges were consumed from a Topaz Flask % to Damage over Time Multiplier with Ignite if charges were consumed from a Ruby Flask Since this build primarily deals damage with hits, a Ruby Flask is immediately ruled out.

Changelog Storm Rain Deadeye League Starter for Path of Exile Mirage 3.28 by havoc616 Mirage 3.28 Last Updated: March 31, 2026 Follow Changelog FAQ Get Link Advertisement This website is supported by ads.
Storm Rain is a payload skill that fires arrows into the sky, which land on the ground and release beams between each other for tons of single target damage.

During the campaign you survive with Life, Evasion and strong positioning; then during Atlas Progression you upgrade your survivability with even more Evasion, Energy Shield via Hybrid Gear , Ghost Dance for burst damage protection, Spell Suppression, and Cast when Damage Taken + Immortal Call .
Storm Rain Deadeye League Starter Gear Set Resistances You do not need specific resistances on any item, just get the required total resistances amongst all gear combined.

Leveling Guide If you're looking for an even more detailed campaign walkthrough check out our: Lightning Arrow Deadeye Leveling Build Guide Rain of Arrows Deadeye Leveling Build Guide Skills Mirage 3.28 Storm Rain Deadeye League Starter Main Damage Auras Mobility Storm Rain is both your primary clear and single target ability.
For clear: attack into each pack and run through them with a Quartz Flask , Freedom of Movement , or any other source of Phasing.

Supplemental Damage is provided by Manaforged Arrows Support , which triggers a multitude of skills: Frenzy to generate Frenzy Charges Ensnaring Arrow which increases the damage Enemies take Tornado to deal massive single target damage Storm Rain which deals damage and generates Power Charges Sniper's Mark + Mark On Hit significantly improves your single target damage by increasing the damage enemies take and splitting your projectiles.
Anger is used to increase your damage, by providing an efficient source of flat elemental damage to attacks.
Grace improves your survivability, by significantly improving your Evasion rating.
A low level Precision is used to cap your hit chance and to provide a moderate but meaningful amount of crit chance.
While not explicitly an aura, Cast when Damage Taken + Immortal Call is used to increase your survivability against burst damage.
Optional: Use Vaal Burning Arrow off cooldown for additional single target damage.

Gathering Winds is the de-facto choice as your first ascendancy node to increase your action speed; resulting in significantly improved mobility, clear speed and single target damage after Normal Lab.
Far Shot is allocated in Cruel Lab to increase your damage from range, but primarily to path towards Endless Munitions .
Endless Munitions is allocated in Merciless Lab, significantly improving your clear speed and single target damage with Storm Rain and Manaforged Arrows .
Focal Point is taken in Uber Lab to increase your single target damage.
Note: The build swaps from Non-Crit to Crit during the late campaign or early atlas progression, to maximise DPS during the T16 Map Section.
2 Stone: You should be fully Crit Swapped around the T16 Map Section.
Ensure you've allocated Entrench and the Chance to Suppress Spell Damage is Lucky mastery for additional survivability before fighting Pinnacles.
Aim for a combined total of 3K+ Life & Energy Shield and 1Million+ DPS for a smooth experience.
4 Stone: Your primary passive tree goal during 4 Stone progression is to cap your Spell Suppression.
Capped Spell Suppression significantly improves your survivability versus the final 2 Pinnacle Bosses: Maven & Uber Elder.
Additionally, aim for a combined total of 3.6K to 4K+ Life & Energy Shield and 2Million to 3Million+ DPS to easily defeat the final bosses.
Typically this means acquiring more stats on gear, allowing you to drop passive tree nodes or masteries, such as Spell Suppression or Accuracy.
Note: This build is recommended as a 4 Stone League Starter, as it maximises your single target damage on fresh start gear.

The #1 Priority is a Bow with as much Flat Elemental Damage as possible.

Secondarily, aim for % Increased Critical Strike Chance, % Increased Attack Speed & %Increased Critical Strike Multiplier suffixes Your Quiver is your second most important item for scaling your damage.

Upon defeating Act 10 Kitava, use the Gambling Vendor to upgrade any weaker item drops from earlier acts, primarily focusing on basic resistance capping.
The life resistance gear you equip here is viable for defeating Eater and Exarch.
As you progress through the Atlas, continue to loot Quivers, Rings & Amulets to increase your DPS.
Around T11 Maps, gamble the gold you've acquired on Bows, searching for a High Elemental DPS Bow, ideally on a Spine Bow or Imperial Bow base.

Additionally, ensure your Diamond Flask and Silver Flask are rolled with the % chance to gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike modifier, to greatly increase your single target DPS during extended boss fights.

Storm Rain Deadeye League Starter 2 Stone Gear Moving from 2 Stones to 4 Stones, your goals are the following: A Higher Elemental DPS Bow 100% Spell Suppression Reaching Level 90+ Generally upgraded stats on the rest of your items.

Consider using the following Essences to craft Rings, Amulets, Quivers & Gloves: Screaming Essence of Torment Screaming Essence of Anguish Screaming Essence of Suffering Consider using the following Essences to craft a High Elemental DPS Spine Bow : Shrieking Essence of Wrath Shrieking Essence of Anger Screaming Essence of Hatred Gamble for a 5L Hybrid Evasion/Energy Shield body armour if you haven't acquired one already.
Note: if you find a 5L Evasion body armour during progression you can equip that as well.
When crafting Hybrid Evasion/Energy Shield gear, such as Sadist Garb or Deicide Mask , consider using a Woe Essence to guarantee a flat Energy Shield modifier.
To further scale your damage, use the trade site or run Abyss in search of a Stygian Vise and a Searching Eye Jewel .
If you don't need to craft a Life or a Resistance Suffix, craft the veiled modifier Regenerate 150 Energy shield per second while a Rare or Unique Enemy is Nearby to improve your ES Recovery.

Upgrade your Bow even further, at this stage this typically involves recombinating Blue Spine Bows with T1 Flat Elemental Damage to Attacks Prefixes.
Afterwards you use Prefixes Cannot be Changed and Harvest Reforge Crit to hit a Increased Crit Chance Suffix.

To upgrade your Quiver: Search for a Base with a Fractured Suffix, such as Crit Multi or Projectile Speed Use Deafening Essence of Torment until you hit an item with a second damage suffix, such as Crit Multi or Projectile Speed If your item has 3 Suffixes, then use an Annul to remove one and craft Cannot Roll Attack Modifiers.
If you remove your Crit Multi or Projectile Speed roll, then return to Essence spamming.
After crafting Cannot Roll Attack Modifiers, Exalt Slam for Life and Increased Damage with Bow Skills.
Typically this means items with fractured Chaos Res, if you value it.

Wait till a Crit Bow Base or any Bow with above 5% Crit Wait for a 5L and socket Increased Critical Strikes Support The reasoning to swap to Crit earlier, even if it is equal or potentially worse during early progression is because Non-Crit runs out of efficient scaling options at T16s and is surpassed by Crit at that point.

In Act 3+ and onward is when Manaforged Arrows Support & Totems begin to equate each other.

Changelog Earthshatter Slayer League Starter for Path of Exile Mirage 3.28 by cArn_ Mirage 3.28 Last Updated: March 30, 2026 Follow Changelog FAQ Get Link Advertisement This website is supported by ads.
Earthshatter is a very well rounded Slam skill that has good coverage and high damage on a low budget.
The Slayer ascendancy provides drastically improved AoE, excellent recovery through overleech, and a high-threshold execute.
Earthshatter sends out spikes that deal heavy damage that you can then detonate with your warcries for massive overlapping explosions.
These Warcries also empower your attacks, providing a big damage boost.
On top of solid damage, you have generous defensive options.
Slayer has continuous leech effects which let you ignore most damage over time and provide a consistent source of healing.
Plus, Slayer is well positioned to access Armor and maximum Resistances, creating a well-rounded defensive package.
Earthshatter Slayer Gear Resistances You do not need specific resistances on any item, just get the required total resistances amongst all gear combined.
Try to keep enemies at just under the maximum range to deal maximum damage.
You can also swap Volley Support with Faster Attacks Support on bosses for better single target.
Intimidating Cry doubles your single target damage for two attacks, so use it whenever it's off cooldown when fighting bosses.
Once you reach maps, Earthshatter becomes your main damage skill.
Impact gives you a good chunk of damage from close range, additional area of effect while mapping and a lot of accuracy, enabling the Precise Technique keystone.
Bane of Legends is a strong damage node overall, giving you mapping and boss damage as well as immunity to Physical reflect.

Brutal Fervour not only prevents your Life leech recovery from stopping when you reach Full Life while doubling the duration of your Life leech effects, but also grants you an additional 10% damage reduction, making it an extremely powerful defensive node.
Headsman allows you to cull enemies you hit that are at 20% or less Life, resulting in a minimum of 25% overall damage increase.

Ascendanc y Schizophrenic Dissociation Tainted Pact Earthshatter Slayer Ascendancy Earthshatter Slayer Ascendancy Schizophrenic Dissociation from the Delirious Bloodline Ascendancy means that with the amount of recovery you have, you effectively take 40% less damage from hits at the cost of not being able to use base jewels.
Getting Precise Technique enabled early with Precision aura provides you with a lot of damage and solves your accuracy.
The Super Endgame tree requires you to have your Clusters as well as the spell suppression gear, although you can start using your clusters as soon as you have them.

Stat Priorities 3.28 - Mirage Earthshatter Slayer League Starter Learn more If you're struggling to survive, progress or want to learn more about damage and defenses in Path of Exile check out our Getting Started section.

Offensive Scaling High Physical Damage on your axe, ideally on a Vaal Axe or Void Axe Attack speed #% increased (Physical or Attack) Damage Exerted Attacks deal #% increased Damage #% more Maximum Physical Attack Damage #% increased Physical or Attack Damage with Axes Defensive Scaling Sufficient +#% to Fire , Cold and Lightning Resistance to cap your Resistances.

Endurance Charges +#% to all maximum Elemental Resistances Fortify Endgame Gearing 3.28 - Mirage Earthshatter Slayer League Starter Resistances You can get Resistances where v er you want and they do not have to be on specific items.
Early Maps Endgame Super Endgame In early maps, your main focus should be on getting your resistances capped and having life on every piece of gear.
Don't neglect your flasks, but you don't need perfect ones early on.
Try to get some way to remove corrupting blood, and get Freeze removal on your quest Quicksilver Flask from Act 1.
Vaal Axe and Void Axe are ideal bases, but any high level base works as long as it has high Physical Damage and as much attack speed as possible.
Make sure you have taken the time to roll your flask properly at this point.

Earthshatter Slayer Endgame Gear Your focus at this point is to get a Body Armour with as much Armour, Life and Physical Damage Reduction as possible, as it allows you to use the next big upgrade for the build Echoes of Creation is a massive damage increase for the build, but is really only safe to use once you acquire the Super Endgame Body Armour.
While Suppression is not absolutely mandatory, it makes you much tankier against spells.
Endurance Charge rings and Boots are also by no means necessary, but are another big boost to your defense.
Otherwise, avoid the following modifiers: Monsters steal Power, Frenzy and Endurance charges on Hit Monsters cannot be Leeched from Why am I dying to Elemental Reflect ?
It is possible you have flat elemental damage on your gloves or rings.
Swap out Infernal Cry when doing maps with elemental reflect, as this causes reflected damage even if you are using Brutality Support .
There are 2 reasons for that to happen: You are not leeching while being poisoned; this can only happen if the first monsters you hit in a map cannot be leeched from.
You prevent this from happening by using The Writhing Jar at the start of your map to spawn worms and attacking them to gain leech.

Video 3.28 - Mirage Earthshatter Slayer League Starter Summary 3.28 - Mirage Earthshatter Slayer League Starter Earthshatter is a well rounded skill that has high damage on a low budget with very good coverage.
Slayer Ascendancy provides a very complete package including high damage, defense, recovery and big AoE.
The Tainted Pact setup allows you to be virtually immortal; clean one shots are the only way to die and it is very hard for that to happen with the defenses of the build.

Changelog Arakaali’s Raise Spider Occultist League Starter for Path of Exile Mirage 3.28 by Shayd Mirage 3.28 Last Updated: March 30, 2026 Follow Changelog FAQ Get Link Advertisement This website is supported by ads.
Channelling Divine Ire activates Cast while Channelling Support , which casts Desecrate , spawning corpses.
For defenses, you begin with a massive life pool thanks to Kaom's Heart alongside having capped block with the help of Bone Offering .
Later on, you swap to Chaos Inoculation and build up an enormous pool of Energy Shield, while maintaining your block.
You also prioritize endurance charges and maximum resistances, nearly capping them out on the endgame setup.
Arakaali's Raise Spider Occultist Gear Set Examples Resistances You do not need specific resistances on any item, just get the required total resistances amongst all gear combined.
Absolution can be mana hungry, so keep leveling your Clarity .
Tempest Shield followed by Arctic Armour are slotted in as you grab more reservation on the tree.
Pick up Summon Lightning Golem in Act 4 for some much needed mana regen as well as attack and cast speed.
Link it alongside your Raise Spectre with Feeding Frenzy Support and Elemental Army Support .
The former boosts your minions' damage and speed, the latter their tankiness.
It is often 1-2 Chaos Orbs even on Day 1 of the league.
DO NOT LINK IT Skills granted by items, in this case Summon Phantasm , use all supports socketed in the item regardless of links.
Use Cyclone linked with Cast while Channelling Support , Desecrate , and Bone Offering to automate spawning phantasms as well as maintaining your Offering to cap block.
Link Malevolence with Generosity Support to boost its effectiveness on your phantasms.
Once you have 6 linked your chest and acquired Leash of Oblation , add Spell Cascade Support and Flesh Offering .
Do note, without Spell Cascade Support , you cannot link Flesh Offering to your Cast while Channelling Support , you don't have sufficient corpse generation for both offerings.
If you have a 5 link, feel free to add Infused Channelling Support until you get a 6 link for the recommended setup.
For more single target damage, you can purchase a second Soulwrest .
Use the exact same supports, in the same exact positions, except for Greater Multiple Projectiles Support .
Your Summon Phantasms update their damage dynamically, offering a significant boost to your single target DPS.
Upon acquiring Arakaali's Fang , socket it with Unbound Ailments Support , Withering Touch Support , and Multistrike Support .
You can swap Multistrike Support for Melee Splash Support for better clear, but make sure to swap back to Multistrike Support for any bossing.
Despair is linked to Blasphemy Support to enable Profane Bloom .
You are able to link Arrogance Support to it for a free boost, thanks to Impresence .
Divine Ire combined with Cast while Channelling Support and Desecrate is your new setup for spawning spiders.
The flask summons two worms, your Divine Ire kills them in the presence of corpses, resulting in you spawning Raise Spiders .
Tempest Shield is added back to help cap off your spell block chance.
Commander of Darkness helps bolster both your and your minions' resistances, as well as providing some damage.
This converts their physical damage to chaos and allows them to apply the powerful Withered debuff.
Withered increases your chaos damage significantly.
Mistress of Sacrifice is taken to significantly increase your block chance, nearly capping it single handedly.
This provides a powerful aura-like effect that increases your minions' damage, while reducing incoming damage.
Void Beacon grants an aura-like effect around you that reduces chaos resistance.
It also effectively removes monster recovery, very useful for fighting on enemy consecrated ground.
Withering Presence is taken primarily for the chaos resistance, as you are life based after the initial swap.
Unholy Authority allows you to apply an additional curse for extra damage.
Once you swap to Chaos Inoculation , you respec Withering Presence for Vile Bastion .
Stormshroud allows you to swap Brine King for Lunaris, gaining reduced elemental damage taken and additional physical damage reduction.
Additionally, the Minion Defence Mastery "Minions Leech 1% of Damage as Life" helps your minions stay alive in boss fights.
If your minions are still struggling with recovery, feel free to swap "Minions Leech 1% of Damage as Life" with "Minions Recover 5% of Life on Minion Death".
You need to add Raise Zombie linked with Summon Phantasm Support for this to work.
It significantly increases your own damage, so you kill monsters while they are affected by the Absolution debuff, smoothing out gameplay.
Tireless and Mystic Bulwark help with managing your mana costs without having to overly rely on your mana flask.
Soulwrest Tree Once you have swapped to Soulwrest , you want to swap your Minion Defence Mastery for "Minions Recover 5% of Life on Minion Death".

Staff Mastery "Recover 2% of Life when you Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff Recover 2% of Energy Shield when you Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff" provides a nice boost to your recovery, making you gain some life and energy shield whenever you block.

It is important that your helmet, chest, gloves and boots all have armour and energy shield for the Armour and Energy Shield Mastery "100% increased Armour and Energy Shield from Equipped Body Armour if Equipped Helmet, Gloves and Boots all have Armour and Energy Shield".
The Protection Mastery "Your Elemental Resistances cannot be lowered by Curses" largely mitigates most of the danger from curses.
Mid Soulwrest Blessed Rebirth makes your phantasms immune to damage for four seconds.
It also lets you swap your Minion Defence Mastery to "Minions have +8% to all maximum Elemental Resistances".

If "Life from Death" and "Blessed Rebirth" together are expensive, then get one with only "Blessed Rebirth" and keep your Minion Defence Mastery specced into "Minions Recover 5% of Life on Minion Death" Mid Enduring Composure provides you with consistent endurance charge generation.
You also use Mid Soulwrest Poison + Leech to give your minions leech.
Arakaali's Tree Spiritual Aid is important to scale the your Profane Bloom damage.
Hearty provides a significant increase in your life regeneration rate.
25% + 2% Attack Speed Clusters are key to scaling damage on this build.
Glorious Vanity with "sacrificed in the name of Ahuana" provides you with an "overleech" effect thanks to Flagellant's Sapphire Flask .
The flask makes you leech based off of incoming damage, and the jewel means the leech does not end when you reach full life.
Any transformed notable that grants "Increased Maximum Life" or "Additional Physical Damage Reduction" or "+x% Chance to Block Attack/Spell Damage" is great.
Arakaali Life + Attack Block are a big part of scaling your damage.
"Minions have x% Increased Attack Speed" and "Minions deal x additional Chaos Damage" are interchangeable with "Minions deal x additional Physical Damage".
Testudo is a cheap anoint that helps with block and gives you some instant recovery.
Arakaali Mid Flex Slot for Stats/Res is in the passive tree to help you fill out any missing resistances or attributes.
Swapping to The Squire requires you to allocate Aggressive Bastion to keep your block capped.
35% + 3% Attack Speed Clusters are a significant jump in damage when you can afford them.

Chaos Inoculation Tree The Red Nightmare and The Blue Nightmare help with both capping your block and resistances with the help of Tattoo of the Ngamahu Firewalker and Tattoo of the Valako Stormrider .
Unnatural Instinct and The Light of Meaning is an efficient package that provides you with an enormous amount of Energy Shield, Resistances, Area of Effect, Regeneration, and Skill Effect Duration.
CI Max Light + Block help round out your block and maximum resistances.
Stormshroud makes you immune to all elemental ailments.
Amanamu's Gaze gives your minions a significant boost in damage.
Prodigious + Riot Queller 8p is used to help cap out your block chance.
Essence Extraction helps you achieve 100% flask uptime with The Tides of Time .
Tattoo of the Valako Shieldbearer is used on your remaining strength nodes to increase your block chance.
Tattoo of the Rongokurai Turtle , Sanctum of Thought , and Armour and Energy Shield Mastery make you immune to extra damage from critical strikes.

Changelog Shock Nova of Procession Archmage Hierophant League Starter for Path of Exile Mirage 3.28 by Goratha Mirage 3.28 Last Updated: March 29, 2026 Follow Changelog FAQ Get Link Advertisement This website is supported by ads.
With the Archmage Support, mana gives both offense and defense making this character scale very well into the endgame where you have absurd cast speed.
Stack mana to gain a big pool through Mind Over Matter and damage with Archmage Support and Arcane Cloak .
Dual Wielding wands adds a lot of damage early at the cost of some defense.
Later on you transition into more a block-based setup with Pledge of Hands .

Pledge of Hands has Greater Spell Echo Support gem built-in, which synergizes very well with Shock Nova , giving it a massive damage boost, this combined with block makes the character very well rounded.
Shock Nova of Procession Archmage Hierophant League Starter Gear Resistances You do not need specific resistances on any item, just get the required total resistances amongst all gear combined.
Rolling Magma works well with Elemental Proliferation Support and Combustion Support supports, this gives it good clear.
Make sure to keep an eye out for any flat damage to spells on weapons and gear, this makes the leveling process much smoother.
Firestorm becomes your single target, it scales very well with Archmage Support and Unleash Support .
Once you start using the Archmage Support support gem, drop both Herald of Ice and Herald of Thunder.
Combine Arcane Cloak with Automation at this point, it gives a big damage buffer and a ton of flat lightning damage based on your maximum mana.
These stages give you extra lightning damage and reduces damage taken from enemies.
At level 38 you get Eternal Blessing Support , this allows you to use one aura without costing reservation, with the downside being you can only use one aura.
Link Purity of Elements with Eternal Blessing Support , this gives you immunity to ailments and a decent amount of all resistances, making gearing much easier early on.
Spell Echo Support is a must have support gem, it benefits this skill much more than anything other, and eventually Greater Spell Echo Support is used through Pledge of Hands .
Keep in mind Spell Echo Support and Greater Spell Echo Support do NOT stack and Pledge of Hands has Greater Spell Echo Support built in to the item.
Much later on you can swap Purity of Elements for Wrath , once you solve resistances on gear.

Endurance charges grant a decent amount of mitigation and Power charges give critical strike chance, and while this isn't a critical strike build it still benefits from Elemental Overload , which is a big multiplier on the tree that triggers on critical.
From Cruel Labyrinth take Divine Guidance , at this point you should have a decent amount of mana nodes.
This scales damage from those, as well as a bit more of damage taken from mana before life, which stacks with Mind Over Matter .
This gives a massive amount of AoE and mana gained as energy shield.
Arcane Blessing scales from Arcane Surge effect on the tree, making it a very insane damage buff.
Next, grab Explosive Impact along with the Fire Mastery 100% increased damage with hits against ignited enemies.
Make sure you have Elemental Proliferation Support on Rolling Magma as you need chance to ignite for this to work.
Next work towards Elemental Overload , a keystone that grants a big damage buff.
After that start working on Mana nodes as soon as you start using Arcane Cloak and Archmage Support .
Ash, Frost and Storm along with it's mastery 15% chance to invert damage is another massive boost to damage.
Near the end of the campaign look to grab Light Eater along with it's mastery for 5% instant leech.
Leech is one of the builds main defensive mechanics.
Evasion and Suppression is the main defensive mechanic for duel-wielding until you get Pledge of Hands .
Once you have Pledge of Hands respec out of Suppresion and Evasion nodes and start putting points into Staff Block nodes such as Enigmatic Defence , Safeguard , and Steelwood Stance .

by strafeous May 8, 2026 Stat Priorities Mirage 3.28 Shock Nova of Procession Archmage Hierophant League Starter Learn more If you're struggling to survive, progress or want to learn more about damage and defenses in Path of Exile check out our Getting Started section.

Energy Shield & Armour Gear (Staff) Energy Shield & Evasion Gear (Dual-Wielding) Campaign Early Maps Pledge of Hands Swap Gearing Mirage 3.28 Shock Nova of Procession Archmage Hierophant League Starter Resistances You can get Resistances where v er you want and they do not have to be on specific items.
Campaign Early Maps Pledge of Hands Swap Invert the Rules or Anathema During the campaign, try to get life and Resistances.
Keep an eye out for Berek's Grip or Valako's Sign for Lightning Leech.
Make sure to craft flat damage to spells early on from Solaris level 2 recipe if you do not have a unique leveling weapon!
Honourhome can also be a decent item to keep an eye out for early on as it helps with mana costs.
In the campaign, you should be focused on Evasion/ES Hybrid gear, keep an eye out for +dexterity rolls as you need some to wear better bases.
Shock Nova of Procession Archmage Hierophant Campaign Gear As you enter the endgame and begin mapping, your first goal is to cap your resistances and meet Attribute requirements.
Mindspiral is a very solid helmet option that grants a lot of flat mana and the very strong mana gained as energy shield modifier.
Annoint Mind Drinker on an amulet for easy mana sustain while mapping.
Keep an eye out for gear that has %suppression rolls and as much flat mana as possible.
Gear needs a dexterity requirement to roll for suppression and an intelligence requirement to roll for mana.
Mana is not as important on this slot, focus on getting as much Evasion/ES as possible and try not to get any life modifiers, so you can make use of the 15% maximum life mastery on the tree.
Look to get Profane Wands with as much flat mana, spell damage, and cast speed as possible.
This item is amazing for Shock Nova of Procession as it has built in Greater Spell Echo Support , an amazing damage link.
Once you equip this item make sure to replace the normal Spell Echo Support gem as it no longer functions.
Once you swap over to Pledge of Hands , you focus on Armour/ES gear instead of Evasion/ES, and you drop Suppression nodes on the tree in favor of Block nodes.
Link Elemental Proliferation Support to Frostblink to spread shocks and enable massive screen wide clearing.
Foulborn Kikazaru is another good unique to look out for as it grants far more flat mana than normally possible on a ring, scaling based on your level.
Foulborn Kalisa's Grace makes mana sustain FAR easier, and allows you to drop Inspiration Support for another good damage support.
Shock Nova of Procession Archmage Hierophant Pledge of Hands Gear There is two main ways to scale damage even further.
Invert the Rules Support with the Invert Elemental Mastery or Anathema .
Invert has a chance to "flip" enemy resistance making it a huge damage increase.
To make use of this is simple, just don't reduce enemy monster resistance by using curses or exposure as it becomes a downside when it flips.
Lightning Penetration Support is still good with this, as it doesn't apply to the enemy itself.
This is the highest boss damage variant but it requires you to sacrifice a ring slot and at a minimum 4 gem slots.

The easiest by far is to use the unique item Kitava's Thirst , this simply casts the curses when you spend mana, however this item has very bad defensive stats compared to Mindspiral , and even reduces your cast speed.
Avoid the following modifiers: Monsters reflect 18% of Elemental Damage Cannot Regenerate Life or Mana How do I get Shock Nova of Procession?
I don't have enough attributes The Evasion/Suppression version requires a lot of dexterity to wear higher bases, look for one or two rolls on your gear.
Later on the Pledge of Hands Block version is far more lenient.
Scale mana for damage through Arcane Cloak and Archmage Support , while also scaling your defences through Mind Over Matter .
Later on scale the damage with Pledge of Hands and it's built in Greater Spell Echo Support .
Invert the Rules Support or Anathema for yet another level of damage scaling.

Changelog Viper strike of Mamba Pathfinder League Starter for Path of Exile Mirage 3.28 by Crouching_Tuna Mirage 3.28 Last Updated: March 25, 2026 Follow Changelog FAQ Get Link Advertisement This website is supported by ads.
The Viper Strike of the Mamba Pathfinder offers a powerful and adaptable League Start Poison build, characterized by strong clear speed and robust defenses.

Unlike other poison skills that heavily incentivize maximizing uptime, duration, and attack speed for a gradual damage ramp, Viper Strike of the Mamba front-loads its damage resulting in a significantly snappier feel.
Early itemization prioritizes hybrid scaling of Life, Energy Shield, and Evasion to enhance survivability.
Master Surgeon provides continuous life recovery, which mitigates the downside of Petrified Blood , allowing you to recover life beyond 50%, granting 22% damage reduction.
While this build operates without mandatory unique items, The Sorrow of the Divine allows life flask effects to extend to Energy Shield, doubling your recovery.
This in combination with Petrified Blood , and Fortification granted by Fortify Support results in a build that is deceptively tanky.
Viper Strike of the Mamba Pathfinder League Starter Gear Resistances You do not need specific resistances on any item, just get the required total resistances amongst all gear combined.

Skills Mirage 3.28 Viper Strike of the Mamba Pathfinder League Starter Poison Concoctio n Mamba Swap Elemental Mamba Mana Mamba From levels 12 to 33, Poisonous Concoction is used to apply multiple poison stacks to enemies via projectile overlap, dealing Chaos Damage over time.
In place of using, or upgrading your weapon you instead gain additional chaos damage by converting the life recovery of Divine Life Flask , resulting in significant damage output with minimal cost.

The most efficient leveling strategy involves continuing with Poisonous Concoction until you obtain enough Chaos Orbs to trade for the Viper Strike of the Mamba gem from another player, then performing the swap.
Until you obtain Nature's Adrenaline , alternate between flasks when clearing to maximise the poison spread provided by Master Toxicist .
Make sure to do 'A Fixture of Fate' in Act 3, to get Added Chaos Damage Support , Battlemage's Cry , Autoexertion , Ancestral Cry and Fortify Support .
Withering Step applies the Withered debuff to enemies, increasing chaos damage taken, use this against Rares and Bosses.
Purity of Elements grants a significant increase in elemental resistances and immunity to all elemental ailments.
This Viper Strike of the Mamba stage uses Pneumatic Daggers , gaining the ability to poison with elemental damage.
You use Awakened Added Cold Damage Support or other flat elemental damage gems for additional DPS.

Pneumatic Daggers simplify mid-tier weapon crafting, as they permit the use of Deafening Essence of Hatred or Deafening Essence of Rage to more readily acquire a high-damage weapon compared to physical or hybrid physical/chaos swords.
Additionally, during weapon crafting, an open prefix modifier can be utilized to craft 'Hits Can't be Evaded,' eliminating the need to itemize or allocate passive skill points for accuracy.

Pneumatic Daggers simplify mid-tier weapon crafting, spam Deafening Essence of Hatred or Deafening Essence of Rage to more easily acquire a high-damage weapon compared to physical or hybrid physical/chaos swords.
Craft ‘Hits Can’t be Evaded’ to eliminate the need for accuracy on gear or passives.

Skill gem changes are minimal compared to previous versions, notably the inability to scale from elemental damage, unlike the Pneumatic Daggers variant, forcing you to drop Awakened Added Cold Damage Support .
The mana variant of Viper Strike of the Mamba utilizes the Whispers of Infinity amulet to scale added flat chaos damage through Mana stacking.
The Whispers of Infinity amulet also converts mana costs into Energy Shield costs, eliminating the need for mana cost reduction and mana leech.
Both Mana and Pneumatic Daggers variants offer comparable damage at a mid-tier budget.
However, the mana variant has superior scaling at higher investments due to its capacity to gain damage from Mana prefix modifiers on items and accessible passive skills.
Double check all of the skill gems, gear, and passive tree variants for each progression step to make sure you have enough mana for all your reservations.
Master Toxicist increases Poison damage and proliferates Poisons onto nearby enemies when a target dies.
This mechanic is critical for clear and must be prioritized when leveling.
Allowing for investment on the passive skill tree to maintain 100% uptime, making flasks a reliable survivability tool.

With Master Surgeon Life Flask recovery persists even after reaching full life which mitigates the downside of Petrified Blood , allowing you to recover life beyond 50%, granting 22% damage reduction.
In conjunction with The Sorrow of the Divine , the life flask also regenerates Energy Shield, boosting your ability to recover from incoming damage.
Nature's Reprisal grants increased effect of Wither, enhancing the damage provided by Withering Step .
Charisma enables the reservation of your Autoexertion setups, Purity of Elements , and Petrified Blood .

Look for dexterity, or dexterity intelligence bases to activate the Evasion Mastery that provides " 15% chance to suppress spell damage if equipped body armour, helmet, gloves and boots all have evasion rating ".
These clusters should be an early priority, as they each provide substantial damage relative to other equipped gear, excluding weapons.
Flesh and Stone can be removed in this variant until you obtain your Reservation Efficiency cluster.
Only apply the Runegraft of Treachery onto the Evasion and Energy Shield Mastery once you have swapped Purity of Elements for Malevolence , otherwise, you struggle to maintain your fortify.
This allows you to drop the Reservation Efficiency Cluster.
It provides a large amount of Chaos Resistance, reducing gear pressure required to cap.

Make sure your Weapon either has +% Physical Damage or +# to Physical Damage.
Vendoring a weapon (any rarity) with a Magic or Rare Rustic Sash (Rare is better) and a Blacksmith's Whetstone returns the same base type weapon with #% Increased Physical Damage on it.
Prioritizing these clusters early is a good way to gain a huge DPS increase.
Item Bases Focus on itemizing with Hybrid Evasion and Energy Shield bases.
Evasion provides attack damage avoidance, enabling consistent recovery between hits.
Energy Shield increases your health pool against damage from all sources except Chaos damage.

Equip the highest level base available and upgrade frequently during progression to bolster your defences: Necrotic Armour Torturer's Mask Phantom Boots Phantom Mitts Flasks Pathfinder is an Ascendancy that maximizes flask utility by providing flask charge generation, ensuring consistent uptime.
This enables builds that are reliant on their flasks for offense and defense.
Master Surgeon allows life flask effects to persist beyond full life.
A high recovery flask such as Saturated Divine Life Flask of Assuaging delivers a constant flow of life recovery.
The Sorrow of the Divine extends life flask recovery to your Energy Shield, doubling the total recovery.
Taste of Hate converts a significant portion of incoming Fire and Lightning damage taken to Cold and provides maximum Cold Resistance.
This lets you fit a Experimenter's Quicksilver Flask of the Cheetah and a Perpetual Silver Flask of the Owl for increased speed.
For a more defensive flask configuration, these can be replaced with a Alchemist's Ruby Flask of the Owl , an Alchemist's Sapphire Flask of the Impala , and a Topaz Flask .

PConc Mamba Earl y Mamba Mi d Mamba Pneumatic Mamba Endgame Mamba Mana The most efficient leveling strategy involves using Poisonous Concoction until you obtain enough Chaos Orbs to trade for the Viper Strike of the Mamba gem from another player, then performing the swap.
During the campaign, try to get Life and Resistances on every non-weapon item.
Equip Two-Stone Rings after level 20, and get Fire , Cold , and Lightning Resistances as close to 75+ as possible.
Viper Strike of Mamba Pconc Gear Prepare a pair of Early Swords with as much maximum base physical damage for your current level to facilitate a smooth transition to Viper Strike of the Mamba .

Prioritize getting a 6 link body armour with as much Evasion and Energy Shield as possible early on Early 6l , it is important to not have any Life modifiers on your body armour because of the Life Mastery " 15% increased maximum Life if there are no Life modifiers on equipped body armour ".
Correct gem links are crucial, as your Autoexertion , Battlemage's Cry , and Alchemist's Mark setup doubles your damage.
At item level 83, one-handed swords gain access to the 'Adds # to # Chaos Damage' modifier.
Use of the Harvest bench to guarantee this modifier when reforging for chaos modifiers on an ilevel 83 Legion Sword Base.
This process costs 100 Vivid Crystallised Lifeforce per attempt but can yield a strong starter weapon with high combined chaos and physical damage.
This notable rolls on Chaos Damage over Time Medium clusters of a minimum item level of 68.
Each such cluster increases your damage by 20%, and their compounding effect contributes significantly to overall damage.
For all other rare jewel sockets, prioritize fitting Rare Jewels that address any missing resistances or attributes.
These jewels offer both damage increases while solving problems with your current gear.
Your Gloves, Boots and Body Armour can all have 2 Eldritch Implicits each.

Viper Strike of Mamba Mid Gear Pneumatic Daggers enable elemental damage scaling for increased poison damage, making it easy to craft powerful weapons with Hatred and Wrath Essences at a relatively low cost.
Two high-tier Elemental Damage rolls combined with the 'Hits Can't be Evaded' craft provide a significant damage increase at this stage and should be prioritized.

Changelog Kinetic Blast of Clustering Necromancer League Starter for Path of Exile Mirage 3.28 by Legi Mirage 3.28 Last Updated: March 25, 2026 Follow Changelog FAQ Get Link Advertisement This website is supported by ads.
It also has built-in damage scaling which streamlines your character building process.
Early on, your character focuses on scaling Life, Evasion rating, Block and Spell chance to avoid most of the damage from attacks and spell hits.
Tempest Shield and Bone Offering help to cap your Block and Spell Block, while Corpse Pact chills enemies around the corpses you spawn with Desecrate .

Skills Mirage 3.28 Kinetic Blast of Clustering League Starter Level 1-31 Level 31-55 Level 55-65 KBoC Swap Maps (Lightning) Maps (Chaos) Personal Choices If you are starting in a fresh league, it's highly recommend to make a Ranger mule to get a free Momentum Support , buying an Iron ring and checking the vendor for items with desirable links.
While fighting Rare or Unique monsters, use Holy Flame Totem and Flame Wall to supplement your damage.
If you have a spare Orb of Transmutation , buy a 2nd Added Lightning Damage Support and link it with your Holy Flame Totem .
After killing Brutus, buy Precision , as Witch's Accuracy is very low early on.
To maximize your single target damage, you want to attack 3 to 4 times (Number of Projectiles/12) and wait for the skill to release.
In Act 2, add Herald of Thunder and Herald of Ice for added elemental damage.
You will need around 10 Orb of Transmutation to buy Gems and craft flat damage on all available prefixes.
Take Lightning Penetration Support as a quest reward and buy: Fork Support , Ballista Totem Support , Faster Attacks Support , Blood Rage , Sniper's Mark , Focused Ballista Support and Spellslinger .
Make sure to level Ballista Totem Support in your off-hand weapon.
Hydrosphere applies Exposure to the target, reducing its Elemental Resistance and creating a sphere that can be hit with Kinetic Blast to increase single target damage.
Link Sniper's Mark with Mark On Hit Support to automate it.
Add a 2nd Spellslinger setup consisting of: Desecrate , Volatile Dead (Later Volatile Dead of Seething ), Spell Cascade Support .
Keep all active gems in your Spellslinger setups at level 1, excluding Bone Offering , as they gain additional mana costs with levels without providing any useful benefits.
To optimize single target damage, try not to stand exactly on top of the target you are fighting.
If possible, try to stand in the Sigil's area, as it provides reduced damage taken when fully charged.
It is the best way to do so however alternatively you can use Power Charge On Critical Support or Wand Mastery until you get the gem quality.
It consumes a portion of your energy shield to provide a defensive buff while you stand in it, taking the portion of incoming damage instead of you.
Kinetic Blast of Clustering provides a huge amount of flat physical damage proportional to your Mana.
At this stage, convert all your physical damage to lightning using Physical to Lightning Support and a Lightning Mastery on the skill tree.
Add Lightning Penetration Support as soon as you can.
Remember to keep all active gems in your Spellslinger setups at level 1, excluding Bone Offering , as they gain additional mana costs with levels without providing any useful benefits.
You want to switch to to chaos damage profile AS SOON AS YOU CAN so don't delay getting your Overwhelming Malice Medium Cluster Jewel .
After acquiring either a Medium Cluster Jewel Critical Strike or Large Cluster Jewel Chaos Damage Cluster Jewel with Overwhelming Malice , switch to this variant as soon as possible.
Overwhelming Malice provides Unholy Might , a buff that fully converts physical damage to Chaos Damage and applies Wither , which is a massive stacking debuff for Chaos Damage .
Swap out Physical to Lightning Support and Lightning Penetration Support for Void Manipulation Support and Sacred Wisps Support for increased Chaos Damage and wisps copying your attacks.
They synergise well with Cast when Damage Taken Support + Immortal Call , mostly in maping situations.
If you consistent charge generation on bosses, use Enduring Composure from armour Small Cluster Jewel or Exarch/Warlord Body Armour implicit/explicit.
Adding level 1 support gem to Immortal Call , Shield Charge or Assassin's Mark can be strong.
First, Commander of Darkness is an Aura that grants you +30% All Resistances and a sizable amount of increased damage.
It's a great early game choice that helps you cap your resistances.
Second, Plaguebringer grants you increased Area of Effect after you consume a corpse and reduces enemy damage and defense when they're near a corpse.
It's worth noting that Shock and Chill granted by this Ascendancy also scales with Ailment Effect from your gear and passive tree.
It provides a ton of Energy Shield and Mana Regeneration, making it a strong defensive option.
The Mana Regeneration part is especially handy to ramp your Corpse Pact Attack Speed before engaging Bosses.
When fully stacked, Rage provides up to 30% more attack damage and its uptime of fully stacked rage is relatively high compared to a Glove implicit.
The other remaining point is small pathing point Minion Damage, Mana towards Essence Glutton .
Minor pantheon: Soul of Aberrath, which prevents damage from burning ground effects.
Once you optain endgame gear pieces and become immune to elemental ailments and stun consider switching to Soul of Lunaris of its defensive benefits.
Before transitioning into the mana-stacking Kinetic Blast of Clustering setup, you will utilize various Wand Attack skills during the Campaign.
Each of these skills have almost identical damage scaling, so you can switch between them effortlessly using the Campaign trees.
The tree provides huge amount of increased damage from the Witch starting nodes and elemental clusters.
Make sure to focus on crafting flat Lightning Damage to Attacks on your Wand and Jewelry.
After acquiring your Transfigured Gem, remove generic nodes like Searing Heat and Snowforged in favor of passive points that scale mana, like Deep Thoughts .
After completing Merciless Labyrinth and allocating Mistress of Sacrifice , start focusing on specing Block and Spell Block nodes.
Attack Block and Evasion is are your main defensive layers so make sure to not neglect them.
Once you acquire your Overwhelming Malice Cluster, that's all you need to change to Chaos Damage profile.
Unspec all Lightning Damage passive points like Tempest Blast and Arcing Blows in favour of Heart of Darkness or missing % life nodes like Cruel Preparation .

Energy Shield on Block (Shaper Shield Suffix) Campaign Hybrid Lightning Hybrid Chaos CI Swap CI Midgame Aspirational MB1 Aspirational MB2 Aspirational HH1 Aspirational HH2 Gearing Mirage 3.28 Kinetic Blast of Clustering Necromancer League Starter Resistances You can get Resistances where v er you want and they do not have to be on specific items.
Item Bases You want to focus on using Hybrid Evasion / Energy Shield bases.
Evasion provides a chance to avoid hits and synergizes well with attack block while Energy Shield increased the total damage you can take from all sources, excluding Chaos damage.
In the early stages of progression, your character will be life-based, utilizing evasion to avoid as much damage as possible.
The hit mitigation is not very good and unfortunately there is not much we can do without sacrificing excesive amouts of damage.
Its difficult to equip Necrotic Armour as the dexterity requirement is very steep.
Your Body Armour and Shield are the most impactful defensive items so it is really important to have correct affixes on them .
While chestpiece covers the biggest slice of Evasion and Energy Shield needs, Shield is the gear piece that is responsible for the chance to block attacks and spells.
Try to avoid having life or life regeneration on the body armour to benefit from 15% increased maxium life Life Mastery Wand Kinetic Wand is by far the best base.
It allows the build to fully convert its damage to Chaos , which provides very powerful scaling vectors such as Wither.
In general, monsters in Path of Exile have lower Chaos Resistance than Elemental Resistance.
Shield with high %Attack Block Chance You want to aim for as high %Chance to Block Attack Damage on your Shield as possible.
It can guaranteed by using Deafening Essence of Loathing on a base with high Block Chance like Titanium Spirit Shield or Transfer-attuned Spirit Shield .
Focus on the % Chance to Block first, then life and elemental resistances.
Offensive stats like % increased Spell Damage are mostly a luxury.
Campaign Early Map s Midgame CI Respec & Progression Aspirational MB Aspirational HH During the campaign, focus on keeping your Elemental Resistances as high as possible.
All Kinetic attack skills have similar scaling, so the most important offensive stat is Added Lightning / Fire / Cold damage.
Added Lightning Damage is preferable but any element is desirable.
Flat Elemental damage on your Wand and Jewelry is what makes or breaks attack Wand leveling.

Changelog Holy Flame Totem Hierophant League Starter for Path of Exile Mirage 3.28 by aer0 Mirage 3.28 Last Updated: March 24, 2026 Follow Changelog FAQ Get Link Advertisement This website is supported by ads.
The Holy Flame Totem Hierophant League Starter provides a balance of damage, clear and defence on a budget.
The Hierophant ascendancy offers massive damage and recovery through Ritual of Awakening , rewarding you for each totem you place.
Dropping Searing Bond totems as you go keeps your damage and recovery maxed out.
Meanwhile, Arcane Blessing provides a massive boost to damage thanks to the build's Arcane Surge scaling.
Huge Mana and Life recovery allow for a comfortable playstyle alongside Block and Spell Block.
Holy Flame Totem Hierophant League Starter Gear Resistances You do not need specific resistances on any item, just get the required total resistances amongst all gear combined.
Early on, you need to supplement your Totem's damage with your own damage, so self cast Purifying Flame .
Stand on the Consecrated Ground created by both skills for a significant amount of Life Regeneration.
Once you hit Level 16, drop Purifying Flame and supplement your damage with Wave of Conviction mines via Blastchain Mine Support .
Mines are required because Ancestral Bond prevents you from dealing damage yourself.
These mines also grant Exposure, reducing enemy resistance.
Place a Flame Wall between the totems and the enemy for extra added damage.
Keep Clarity at level 5 to prevent it from requiring too much reservation.
In order to maximize your recovery and damage from Ritual of Awakening , place Searing Bond Totems as you move around to ensure you are at maximum totems at all times.
These utility Totems are not designed to deal damage, rather they get placed anywhere around you to increase the value of the Ascendancy.
Replace Wave of Conviction with Pyroclast Mine of Sabotage for even more resistance reduction on bosses.
Use these mines to apply the aura, but you can also detonate one from time to time to apply the debuff from Combustion Support .
Detonating the mines also provides Power and Frenzy charges thanks to Charged Mines Support .
Pursuit of Faith grants an additional totem for a large boost to damage.
Ritual of Awakening provides a massive boost of damage, Mana recovery and Life regeneration.
Arcane Blessing is a huge boost to damage, Cast Speed and Mana recovery.
Conviction of Power gives permanent Power and Endurance Charges for some added tankiness and critical strike chance.
Take this last as you don't swap to critical strikes until later.
This prevents YOU from dealing damage, but not your proxies, such as mines and totems.
For this reason, swap Purifying Flame for Wave of Conviction supported by Blastchain Mine Support for additional damage and utility after taking Ancestral Bond.
There are a number of Minion Damage and Minion Attack Speed nodes in the leveling section.
This is for easy access to damage via Spiritual Aid and a significant boost to Shield Charge speed via Spiritual Command .
These can be dropped later to spec into Critical Strike nodes.
Early Game Tree Use the Early Maps Tree for the swap to Critical Strike.
It is wise to take some critical nodes before dropping Elemental Overload so you don't lose a bunch of damage at once.
At this point, make sure you swap your Support Gems to the Early Maps setup as a large amount of Critical Chance and damage come from your Supports.
This tree removes the Minion Damage and Attack Speed wheels.

Added fire damage is preferable, but Cold and Lightning are decent as well!
Next to Dialla in the Eternal Lab (left side) in Act3, there is a Crafting Recipe for added Fire Damage to Spells .
Holy Flame Totem Hierophant League Starter Gear As you enter the Atlas of Worlds and begin mapping, your first goal is to cap your Resistances and meet Attribute requirements.
Upgrade your Flasks and make sure they are the relevant types shown on the right side.
Life and Life Regeneration are high priority and synergize with your Ascendancies.
Get Increased Chance to Block on your shield for a big boost to defence.
This is a massive boost to damage and survivability!
After this, target a Cloak of Flame for some powerful Physical damage mitigation.
When available, buy one with +2 levels of Socketed AoE/Projectile Skill Gems for a boost to damage.
The Ashes of the Stars Amulet is a powerful item that boosts damage and quality of life.
Fill empty sockets with Rare Jewels that address any missing resistances or attributes.
Holy Flame Totem Hierophant League Starter Endgame Gear Once you have farmed a significant amount of currency, its time to double your damage.
This is a massive boost to clear speed and single target damage.
First, get a Lethal Pride that has useful mods such as Double Damage and Increased Armour.
Unnatural Instinct in the top middle slot near Hex Master gives a huge boost to damage, mana reservation and survivability.

A Watcher's Eye can give strong bonuses alongside Determination % Chance to Block Attack Damage while affected by Determination + to Armour while affected by Determination You Take 50% Reduced Extra Damage From Critical Strikes while affected by Determination The Bottled Faith Flask synergizes perfectly with this setup.

Keep in mind, the Searing Bond totems do almost no damage, they are just there to amplify the damage of Holy Flame!
When in the endgame and scaling Critical Strikes, make sure you have unspecced Elemental Overload as it makes your crits deal no extra damage.
